title: ciliaria bronchialis
intro: Ciliaria bronchialis, also known as Stachys sylvatica or Wood Betony, is a perennial herb native to Europe and Western Asia, belonging to the mint family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its antispasmodic and expectorant properties, which aid in relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis, coughs, and asthma. The medicinal properties of Ciliaria bronchialis include its ability to reduce inflammation, ease digestion, and promote relaxation, making it a valuable herb for improving overall health and well-being. Herbal preparations of Ciliaria bronchialis can be found in teas, tinctures, and infusions, making it easily accessible for those seeking its health benefits.
